_comment: Illustrative LLM output. Actual tags will vary.

tagged_notes.insight_statement: The Add Task button is not discoverable — users look in the sidebar before finding it via keyboard tooltip, suggesting the primary action needs more visual prominence.
tagged_notes.suggested_follow_up: Does moving Add Task to a persistent empty-state CTA reduce time-on-task in the next round of usability testing?

tagged_notes.insight_statement: Search fails for historical task recall — users cannot find tasks older than a few weeks without manual scrolling.
tagged_notes.suggested_follow_up: What percentage of search queries are for tasks older than 90 days? Analytics review needed.

tagged_notes.insight_statement: Recurring tasks is a primary switching trigger — users explicitly sought this feature and switched from Asana because it was inaccessible there, implying ours must remain more accessible to maintain the advantage.
tagged_notes.suggested_follow_up: Is recurring tasks discoverability actively better than Asana's? Run a comparative usability task.

tagged_notes.insight_statement: Recurring tasks delivers quantified time savings (2 hours/week) and drives strong promoter sentiment — this is a core retention feature that should be protected and promoted.
Team adoption stalls when non-PM team members do not see value quickly enough during onboarding — the tool is adopted by the PM but not the team, creating a partial-adoption ceiling.
tagged_notes.suggested_follow_up: How long does it take for non-PM team members to make their first update? Funnel analysis needed.
